title: Mooncraft Butt Better
description: A more immersive and optimised game including many additions of both tweaks to the base game and a discreet revamp of the games style.
body:
Most mods are either for performance or small tweaks the biggest being an elytra, totem and a trash slot.(the trash slot doesnt appear whilst using the gui resource pack but you can still use the slot by hovering over an item and pressing the DEL button or whatever your keybind is.) The lesser mods are either mods that make some of the game's features a bit more convenient or make the game flow better for certain types of players, as an example for people who like to build worldedit is pre-installed so you can let your imaginaton go wild. I've also added quite a few gui, texture and animation changing resource packs.(the 3d resource pack can be a bit demanding so i recommend tinkering with that and the other resource packs to get a stable gameplay or a gameplay you deem as performant enough.)
Some of the mods and a resource pack arent able to uploaded but are needed in this modpack so I shall link them here.
You will have to re-enable the Better 3D Blocks resource pack.
But if you dont want to have to all of this I would recommend downloading it off of curseforge.
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard)
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-chunk-save](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-chunk-save)
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fix-gpu-memory-leak](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fix-gpu-memory-leak)
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/connectivity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/connectivity)
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/minecraft-3d-ressource-pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/minecraft-3d-ressource-pack)
